channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Investigation focus in death of ex-Yankees star's son shifts to possible food poisoning
item.description: Costa Rican investigators have shifted their focus in their investigation into the death of Miller Gardner to possible food poisoning. Miller was 14.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers' Trump visit decision sends fans spiraling
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers fans on Tuesday were upset with the team's decision to visit President Donald Trump and celebrate their 2024 World Series win at the White House.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In the era of big velocities, some pitchers are still finding other ways to succeed
item.description: SURPRISE, Ariz. (AP) — Texas Rangers left-hander Cody Bradford says he realized early on that he probably wouldn’t ever possess the type of fastball that causes scouts to take a second look at their radar guns.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A’s fans: Where to eat, drink near the team’s new ballpark
item.description: From a Sac classic -- tacos dusted with what?? -- to Drake's Brewing's massive beer garden, these eateries offer the perfect spot to fuel up before or after the game.
item.dc:creator: Linda Zavoral, The Mercury News

item.title: When George Foreman and Hayward were at the top of the boxing world
item.description: George Foreman lived and trained in Hayward in his early years as a professional up until his win in 1973 over Joe Frazier.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Basketball legend fires back at 'big dummies' who ignored Caitlin Clark's immediate WNBA impact
item.description: Basketball legend Cheryl Miller hit out at critics who ignored the impact Caitlin Clark made during the 2024 WNBA season and talked about her race.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dodgers set date to visit Trump for World Series celebration at White House
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers announced Tuesday night the team will visit President Donald Trump and the White House to celebrate their World Series win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blues post 7 consecutive wins in a push to make the playoffs after a two-year absence
item.description: ST. LOUIS (AP) — The wins just keep on coming for the St. Louis Blues, and their seven-game streak has significantly improved their chances of returning to the playoffs after a two-year absence.
item.dc:creator: WARREN MAYES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel reveals reasoning for return to New England
item.description: Patriots head coach Mike Vrabel reveals his reasoning for why he returned to coach the team he once played for during a recent appearance on OutKick's "Don't @ Me with Dan Dakich.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: A handful of March Madness coaches stand out for their fashion choices amid a sea of casual attire
item.description: As the NCAA Tournament heats up, the styles of Notre Dame's Niele Ivey, LSU’s Kim Mulkey, Alabama’s Nate Oats, South Carolina’s Dawn Staley and a handful of other coaches stand out in a sea of coaches in team polo shirts and quarter-zip pullovers.
item.dc:creator: Kristie Rieken, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers to make Trump White House visit next month
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers plan to visit President Donald Trump at the White House to celebrate their World Series victory, the team announced Tuesday. The team released a statement Tuesday afternoon that said it would visit the White House "in keeping with long-standing baseball tradition.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stanford football coach Troy Taylor fired after allegations
item.description: (KRON) -- Stanford football head coach Troy Taylor has been fired, team officials announced Tuesday, following a report that he was investigated twice for allegedly mistreating staffers.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: USC star JuJu Watkins suffers season-ending knee injury in March Madness win over Mississippi State
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — JuJu Watkins was carried off the floor with a season-ending knee injury in the first quarter of top-seeded Southern California’s game against Mississippi State in the NCAA Tournament on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sacramento State to hire Mike Bibby as basketball coach, AP source says
item.description: Former Sacramento Kings star Mike Bibby will be hired as the basketball coach at Sacramento State, a person familiar with the decision told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Sam Merrill has found a home in Cleveland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a homecoming for former Bountiful High and Utah State star Sam Merrill Sunday night. Merrill hit a couple of three-pointers in his return to his home state in Cleveland's 120-91 win over the Jazz. Merrill says loves playing in front of family and friends.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Late boxing legend George Foreman had deep ties to this East Bay city
item.description: (KRON) -- Boxing legend and former heavyweight champion George Foreman died last Friday at the age of 76. Foreman was born in Texas. However, after a troubled upbringing, he then moved to the West Coast after ninth grade when he enrolled in President Lyndon B. Johnson's Job Corps work program.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Padres Opening Day: What's new inside Petco Park
item.description: The baseball season has finally returned and San Diego Padres fans are getting amped to set foot back inside Petco Park. Here's what is new for fans inside the stadium.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Power conferences box out 'Cinderella' for the first time
item.description: The Sweet 16, a popular destination for bracket-busting mid-majors, will be made up entirely of teams from power conferences, a first since the bracket expanded to 64 teams in 1985.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WWE legend Kane says Dems have 'real issue' with masculinity
item.description: WWE Hall of Famer Kane — also known as Glenn Jacobs, mayor of Knox County, Tennessee — joined "Morning in America.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego FC dealt first loss in inaugural season
item.description: San Diego FC lost its first game of the season thus far on Sunday when the club fell 2-1 to Austin FC at Q2 Stadium in Texas.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: BYU fans celebrate Sweet 16 bid with Cougars
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Hours after BYU pulled out a 91-89 thriller over Wisconsin to advance to its first Sweet 16 since 2011, hundred of diehard BYU fans showed up at Provo Airport at 1:30 in the morning to welcome the conquering heroes back from Denver. "What a game!" said one BYU fan.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New York girls basketball coach fired for hair-pulling incident with player apologizes
item.description: In a statement shared with local media, Zullo, 81, said he regretted his behavior and offered apologies to the player, her family, the team, the district, and the community.
item.dc:creator: Griffin Haas, NewsNation

item.title: In March Madness, BYU gets a stop, then gets to go ... to Sweet 16 with 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: The BYU Cougars led the entire game Saturday but still had to make one, final defensive stop against Wisconsin's irrepressible guard, John Tonje, to seal a 91-89 victory over the Badgers and the program's first trip to the Sweet 16 since 2011 — the days of Jimmer Fredette.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Colorado Mesa Women's lacrosse team triumphs after early struggles
item.description: The Colorado Mesa University lacrosse team, led by head coach Ashley Delaney, has made a significant jump this season, overcoming a 1-4 start in nonconference play with two statement wins in RMAC competition.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Top-ranked Chicago area softball player to represent Puerto Rico at U-15 Pan American Championship
item.description: ROSELLE, Ill. — In the backyard of her Roselle home, Maya Melendez practices her favorite sport on her personal field of dreams. “When you’re a kid playing (sports), it’s basketball in the street, so what kid wouldn’t want to have their own field in their yard?” Maya’s dad, Randy Smith, figured.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Aggies looking for another first round victory
item.description: LEXINGTON, Kent. (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State broke a 23-year winless drought in the NCAA Tournament last year, beating TCU. Now, they want to go on a deeper run. "Last year, we were very excited to be there," said Aggies leading scorer Ian Martinez after USU's first win in the Big Dance since 2001.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
